name: Essay AI Suite
title: Essay AI Suite

description.en: Shared AI service suite for Dify essay grading, OCR, document extraction, and batch jobs.
description.es-es: Shared AI service suite for Dify essay grading, OCR, document extraction, and batch jobs.
description.ja: Shared AI service suite for Dify essay grading, OCR, document extraction, and batch jobs.
description.ms: Shared AI service suite for Dify essay grading, OCR, document extraction, and batch jobs.
description.pt-br: Shared AI service suite for Dify essay grading, OCR, document extraction, and batch jobs.
description.ru: Shared AI service suite for Dify essay grading, OCR, document extraction, and batch jobs.
description.ko: Shared AI service suite for Dify essay grading, OCR, document extraction, and batch jobs.
description.zh-Hant: 面向 Dify 的作文批改、OCR、文檔提取與批量任務公共 AI 服務套件。
description.zh: 面向 Dify 的作文批改、OCR、文档提取与批量任务公共 AI 服务套件。
description.tr: Shared AI service suite for Dify essay grading, OCR, document extraction, and batch jobs.

zh.introduction: 是面向 Dify 的公共 AI 服务套件，用于将作文批改、批量任务、OCR、文档提取等重型能力从 Dify 工作流下沉到稳定的 HTTP 服务。

features.title: 轻量 Dify 调用
features.description: 通过 HTTP 接口向 Dify 提供单篇批改、批量批改、OCR 和文档提取能力。

features.title: 批量任务稳定执行
features.description: 内置任务状态、进度、重试、超时和结果持久化。

features.title: 第三方 API 直连
features.description: 支持 OpenAI-compatible LLM、视觉 OCR 模型和外部文档解析服务。

en.introduction: is a shared AI service suite for Dify apps. It moves essay grading, batch jobs, OCR, and document extraction out of complex Dify workflows into stable HTTP services.

features.title: Lightweight Dify Integration
features.description: Provides HTTP endpoints for single essay grading, batch grading, OCR, and document extraction.

features.title: Stable Batch Jobs
features.description: Includes job status, progress, retries, timeouts, and persisted results.

features.title: Direct Provider Calls
features.description: Supports OpenAI-compatible LLMs, vision OCR models, and external document extraction APIs.

notes: The app package references ghcr.io/zhangyufei820/essay-ai-suite:0.1.0. The GitHub Actions workflow .github/workflows/essay-ai-suite-image.yml builds and pushes this image to GHCR.
